subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Us unto thee, that thou mayest render thanks unto God, thy Lord, and turn with thy heart toward the precincts of luminous glory. Blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الیک لتشکر الله ربک و تتوجه بقلبک الی شطر عز منیرا طوبی لک
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
